name: nina the killer
description:
⟢ won't you teach her how to kiss? :( it's just some bff bonding activites....

fempov, 2nd person, friends to lovers, friends with benefits, proxy!user, nina probably using you to get over jeff, otherwise pretty tame surprisingly

𓈒⠀𓂃⠀⠀˖⠀𓇬⠀˖⠀⠀𓂃⠀𓈒

she's finally here!! (the crowd goes wild)

took me forever to think of a prompt for her but i love a good wlw friends to lovers

this is super self indulgent which is why it's fempov sorry i just wanna kiss her

also trans nina is my truth im sorry she's just so mtf girl kisser to me... i didn't specify what equipment she's got going on down there though, so feel free to go wild w whether or not she's had bottom surgery

i'm not terribly happy w this intro message im so sorry i suck at writing dialogue ESPECIALLY for bubbly characters but she's just too cute
